questions: If you could rename yourself using a super cool dog name, what would you pick instead of Kylo?
On a scale of one to ten, how much do you enjoy baths? (Be honest, Kylo, we won't tell anyone!)
If you could talk to other dogs at the dog park, what’s the first thing you’d complain about or brag about?
Shibas are famous for being a bit... stubborn. What’s the last thing you absolutely refused to do, even when your human really wanted you to?
What’s the most interesting smell you’ve ever encountered on a walk? Like, something that made your tail go completely crazy?
Do you prefer the bustle of the city sidewalks or the quiet of a grassy park? Which one feels more like 'home' to you?
If you could rename yourself using a super cool dog name, what would you pick instead of Kylo?
Those little bursts of energy Shiba zoomies—what usually triggers yours? Is it pure joy, or maybe a need to escape a bad song on the radio?
What's the best smell in the entire world, in your expert opinion?
When you look out the window, what is the most interesting thing you see happening outside that makes you stop and stare?
If you could trade places with any other animal for just one day, who would you pick and why?
When you nap, are you more of a curled-up tight little ball, or do you prefer to sprawl out like you own the whole couch?
Sometimes Shibas give side-eye. What usually earns you that famous Shiba side-eye glare from your perspective?
Thinking back, what’s one memory from when you were a tiny puppy that still makes you smile (or wag)?
Your person is really smart, being an ENTP and all. What’s the weirdest or most interesting thing they’ve tried to teach you to do lately?
What's the weirdest thing you've ever tried to sneak a taste of that you probably shouldn't have?
Do you have a favorite spot in the house where you feel like the undisputed ruler of the domain?
Hey there, Kylo! You look like you've got a lot of stories in your fluffy head. If you could have one giant, never-ending supply of your absolute favorite treat, what would it be?
Being a Shiba, you must have opinions! What's your favorite thing about your human, besides the obvious food-giving part?
If you had to describe the flavor of your favorite treat using only barks and growls, what would that sound like?
Sometimes Shibas have strong personalities. What’s one thing you absolutely refuse to do, no matter how nicely you’re asked?
Do you think other dogs truly understand the noble art of the Shiba side-eye, or is it just us who get it?
If you could swap places with any animal in Griffith Park for a day, who would you be and why?
Chinese New Year must involve some interesting smells and maybe even special treats. What's the tastiest thing you've ever snagged (or been given!) during a big celebration?
When you’re dreaming really hard, what kind of adventure are you usually on?
Do you prefer sunny spots for naps, or do you like finding the coolest, shadiest spot under the furniture?
When the mail carrier comes by, what is your official, very important duty in protecting the house?
When you look out the window, what's the most exciting thing you see happening on your street?
Your person is an ENTP—that means they're probably full of wild ideas! What's the most surprising or downright weird thing they've tried to get you to do lately?
If you could swap places with any other animal in the neighborhood for just one day, who would you pick and what would you do?
When you look out the window, what kind of things do you see that make you feel the need to let out a good, loud 'A-roo'?
I hear you're a pro at the 'kibble chase' game. What's your secret strategy? Are you a sprinter or more of a strategic pouncer?

How do you feel about car rides? Are you the adventurous window-gazer, or the 'are we there yet?' complainer?
Being a Shiba, you probably have some very strong opinions. What's one thing humans do that you find utterly baffling?
When you look out the window, what keeps your attention the most—cars, people, or something else?
Do you ever try to 'talk back' to your owner when they're telling you 'no'? What sound do you use when you really want something?
Being a Shiba in LA sounds pretty cool! If you could pick one spot in the whole city to nap in every day, where would it be?
Sometimes humans talk about their heritage. Have you picked up any cool Chinese words or phrases from your owner?
Being a Shiba, you're known for being a bit independent. How often do you actually *listen* to your human right away?
What's your go-to spot in the house for taking a nap? Is it sunny, dark, or somewhere you can keep an eye on the door?
What’s your favorite part of the day: morning zoomies, afternoon sunbathing, or evening cuddles?

Have you ever managed to hide a favorite toy so well that even *you* forgot where it was?
